title: Darling Dambakku Lyrics Maan Karate Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Darling Dambakku
Singer:  Benny Dayal, Sunidhi Chauhan
Music: Anirudh
Movie: Maan Karate
Lyrics: Yugabharathi

Darling Dambakku, Darling Dambakku
Darling Dambakku, Darling Dambakku
da kuda kuda kuda kuda kuda kuda

Paavi payale iva uyir moochula
kada podura oyaama.
Aavi upugaya iva adi nenjula
vilayadura pogaama.

mmm naan puviyalathaa poruppeduthadhu yen
adhu puriyudahda..
oh...nenavula thaan kudi irundhidathaan
ena theriyudhada.

aathaadi thalakaalu puriyaama
paatheney unna naanum thayangaama
kaathodu kaathaaga kai korthu nadapeney
velagaaama.

Darling Dambakku, Darling Dambakku
Darling Dambakku, Darling Dambakku
da kkuda kkuda kkuda kkuda kkuda kkuda

kodi senmam eduthaalum
unna serum varam ketpen naan.
ooru kannu padumenu usuroda
ada kaappen naan.

Neerukkula nenavaaga nenaiyaama
unna paarpen naan.
Koda veyil adichaalum
unna verkka vida maatten naan.

Andha vaanam mattum vara
indha boomi suthum vara
unna kadhal senjiduven thannaala

Kannil katchi ullavara
kanna moodi sollumvara
unna kaathu vachiruppen anbaala

aathaadi thalakaalu puriyaama
paatheney unna naanum thayangaama
kaathodu kaathaaga kai korthu nadapeney
velagaaama.

Ramanukku seethai, kannanukku radhai
adiye maamanukku jodi neyadi.

Paavi payale iva uyir moochula
kada podura ....

Darling Dambakku, Darling Dambakku
Darling Dambakku, Darling Dambakku
da kkuda kkuda kkuda kkuda kkuda kkuda

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Darling Dambakku'?

The song conveys a playful and joyful vibe, celebrating love and happiness.

What is the plot context of 'Darling Dambakku' in the movie?

In Maan Karate, the song is featured during a lively celebration, highlighting the fun and carefree moments of the characters.

Who are the singers of 'Darling Dambakku'?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal and Sunidhi Chauhan.

Who is the music director for this song?

The music for 'Darling Dambakku' is composed by Anirudh.

When was 'Darling Dambakku' released?

The song was released on March 16, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Darling Dambakku', the characters of Maan Karate revel in the joy of love and celebration. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect party anthem. The playful exchanges between the singers evoke a sense of carefree fun, inviting listeners to join in the festivities. Overall, the song encapsulates the essence of youthful exuberance and the joy of togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Darling Dambakku from Maan Karate is a vibrant and energetic duet that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With the dynamic vocals of Benny Dayal and Sunidhi Chauhan, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Anirudh's infectious beats combined with playful lyrics make it a must-listen for any party playlist!

Oh dear, this life is going to be taken away without any hesitation. This breath is playing in my heart without leaving me.
Hmm, I have taken care of the earth, do you understand that? Oh... I only know that my thoughts are gathered here.
I have seen without understanding, I will also be scared, holding your hand, I will walk without fear.
Darling Dambakku, Darling Dambakku Darling Dambakku, Darling Dambakku da kkuda kkuda kkuda kkuda kkuda kkuda
Even if I take the best of the best, I will ask for your blessings. I will protect you as if the village is watching.
I will look at you as a thought in the water. Even if the scorching sun hits, I will not let you go.
This sky will come only when this earth spins, I will express my love for you.
I have closed my eyes to those who have a vision and I will protect you out of love.
I have seen without understanding, I will also be scared, holding your hand, I will walk without fear.
For Rama, there is Sita, for Krishna, there is Radha, and for my uncle, there is a pair.
Oh dear, this life is going to be taken away without any hesitation....
